title: Small-Cap communication services stocks ranked by quant ratings after earnings season
content:
As the earnings season winds down, investors are turning their attention to updated quant ratings following the latest round of corporate results. The scores provide a snapshot of how companies rank across key factors such as valuation, growth, profitability, momentum, and revisions after reporting their quarterly performance.

Below is a snapshot of small-cap communication services companies with market capitalizations between $30M and $2B, highlighting those with the highest and lowest quant ratings after the earnings season, underscoring the stocks that strengthened their fundamentals as well as those that lagged.

TOP-QUANT RATED STOCKS:

KORE Group Holdings (KORE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/KORE]), Quant ratings: 4.95, Strong Buy

Anterix (ATEX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ATEX]), Quant ratings: 4.86, Strong Buy

ATN International (ATNI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ATNI]), Quant ratings: 4.81, Strong Buy

Sohu.com (SOHU [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SOHU]), Quant ratings: 4.62, Strong Buy

Taboola.com (TBLA [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TBLA]), Quant ratings: 4.34, Buy

BOTTOM QUANT RATED STOCKS:

Thryv Holdings (THRY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/THRY]), Quant ratings: 1.08, Strong Sell

Angel Studios (ANGX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ANGX]), Quant ratings: 1.08, Strong Sell

Rumble (RUM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/RUM]), Quant ratings: 1.13, Strong Sell

Travelzoo (TZOO [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TZOO]), Quant ratings: 1.20, Strong Sell

Ibotta (IBTA [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IBTA]), Quant ratings: 1.35, Strong Sell
